title: fraxinus lanceolata var. viridis
intro: Fraxinus lanceolata var. viridis, also known as the Green Ash tree, is a deciduous tree native to North America, characterized by its lance-shaped leaves and green foliage. The medicinal properties of Fraxinus lanceolata var. viridis include its use as a natural anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antispasmodic agent, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to lower blood pressure, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems. Fraxinus lanceolata var. viridis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health issues, and its bark is also used in traditional medicine.
